title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is an innovative demo app showcased at Google Cloud Next '26 that combines Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to create a Generative UI experience. The app uses agentic features and Agent-to-UI to generate personalized on-demand images for printing on lattes based on individual customer preferences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a demo app shown at Google Cloud Next '26 that pairs Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to build a Generative UI experience. It demonstrates how agentic features and an Agent-to-UI approach generate personalized, on-demand images that print on lattes according to individual customer preferences. The relevance lies in showing a concrete pattern for agent orchestration driving UI inside a Flutter and Firebase stack. Key takeaways cover the integration of Gemini for image generation and the role of agentic development in producing per-customer output.
